member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.MsBuild.Enums.KeysInConfiguration
member.summary: Defines property keys found within MSBuild configuration property groups.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.MsBuild.Enums.KeysInConfiguration.PlatformTarget
member.summary: PlatformTarget property for CPU architecture targeting.

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.MsBuild.Values.ProjectFrameworks
member.summary: Framework versions and platform constants for MSBuild projects

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.MsBuild.Values.ProjectFrameworks.UapFwVersions
member.summary: List of Universal Windows Platform framework versions

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.MsBuild.Values.ProjectFrameworks.TargetPlatformMinVersion
member.summary: Target platform minimum version property name

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.MsBuild.Values.VsProjectItemTypes
member.summary: Constants for MSBuild project item types used in csproj files.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.MsBuild.Values.VsProjectItemTypes.Content
member.summary: Content item type - files included as content in the output.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.MsBuild.Values.VsProjectItemTypes.Compile
member.summary: Compile item type - source code files to compile.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.MsBuild.Values.VsProjectItemTypes.PackageReference
member.summary: PackageReference item type - NuGet package references.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.MsBuild.Values.VsProjectItemTypes.None
member.summary: None item type - files included in the project but not compiled or copied.
